problem_solved: Primary care access is limited and expensive, with long wait times preventing timely diagnosis and treatment
solution_description: AI-powered virtual primary care platform integrated with major health systems. Provides 24/7 access through AI-driven symptom assessment and clinical decision support. Partners with Hartford HealthCare, Hackensack Meridian, Cedars-Sinai for hybrid virtual/in-person care with shared medical records
traction_signals: Partnerships with top US health systems
AI Physician Mode integrated with EHRs
Single medical record with health system partners
notes: AI-first primary care platform. Not specifically SDOH-focused but could integrate SDOH screening. Strong health system partnerships. Medium Varden fit - primary care automation vs. SDOH infrastructure. Advisory board includes leaders from Cedars-Sinai, Mayo Clinic
